title: Quality requirement posters
bodyHtml:
To help you easily check Back Market’s grading and testing requirements and train new employees on the best practices, we’ve created posters that you can download, print, and hang in multiple locations on your shop floor. 

Testing posters:
  • Smartphones and tablets
  • Computers
  • Apple earphones and watches

Grading posters
  • Smartphones and tablets
  • Laptops and MacBooks
 

Why is it important to use the Back Market quality posters?

These posters detail Quality Charter requirements for quick reference. By respecting the Quality Charter, you can tackle potential customer contacts before they even occur. Being proactive and ensuring our customers receive high-quality products has a lot of advantages:
  • Functional products increase customer trust in the refurbishing industry as a whole.
  • You’ll spend less time and money on customer service requests.
  • You’ll pay less overall on product returns and repairs.
